pi_items.source: Task description line: 'Change the Title to Noise Violation - 42 Oak St'; setup_task.sh line 16 shows initial title is different, but refactoring task expects this final title
Task description line: 'Create a NEW Complaint case titled Sanitation Hazard - 42 Oak St'
Code inspection of setup_task.sh line 17; initial complaint description contains 'drums loudly' but does NOT contain 'music'
Code inspection of setup_task.sh line 17; initial complaint description contains 'trash' and 'rats' but does NOT contain 'garbage' or 'rubbish'
Code inspection of setup_task.sh line 17; address appears in initial complaint description

privileged_info_summary: The task involves splitting a synthetic multi-issue complaint about a Neighbor Nuisance at 42 Oak St into two separate cases. The original complaint contains noise allegations (drums, loud noise) and sanitation allegations (trash, rats). The metadata claims include keywords that are partially incorrect: 'music' is listed as a noise keyword but the actual complaint mentions 'drums'; 'garbage' and 'rubbish' are listed as sanitation keywords but the actual complaint uses 'trash' and 'rats'. The address 42 Oak St is correctly specified. The title keywords 'Noise Violation' and 'Sanitation Hazard' are correct as the target titles after refactoring.
